The Portland Collection · Tune index hosted by

The Portland Collection tune index

A searchable, unofficial index of 942 tunes in The Portland Collection: Contra Dance Music in the Pacific Northwest (volumes 1–3, compiled by Sue Songer and Clyde Curley), with sheet music and playback for the 545 tunes matched on thesession.org.

Buy the books

Volume 1 (revised) Volume 2 Volume 3 Official tune list (PDF)

No tunes match your filters.

Learning tunes from the Portland Collection?

TuneBox is a free digital tunebook and practice planner for traditional musicians. Import any of these tunes from thesession.org in a couple of taps, keep your repertoire organized per instrument, and let spaced repetition decide what to practice tonight.

Open TuneBox — it’s free

942 tunes · 546 matched on thesession.org · 545 with sheet music & playback

The Portland Collection is © Sue Songer & Clyde Curley. This independent index lists tune names only and is not affiliated with or endorsed by the compilers — please buy the books for the real thing.

Notation and links from the community archive thesession.org · rendering & playback by abcjs · page by TuneBox.
